core_mechanism: reduction of a high-dimensional continuous-time evolution to low-dimensional parameter dynamics by, at each time step, projecting the governing flow onto the tangent space of a low-dimensional nonlinear manifold via least-squares residual minimization (a time-dependent variational / Dirac--Frenkel projection)
brief_reason: The abstract represents the solution by a parametrized ansatz on a low-dimensional nonlinear manifold and advances it by minimizing the residual of the evolution equation (equivalently discretizing the Dirac--Frenkel variational principle for the parameter dynamics) at each step.
